_notice: ALL RECORDS BELOW ARE FICTIONAL. This file illustrates the STRUCTURE and RELATIONSHIPS of the grants/outcomes model. It contains no production data. Every name, number, date, identifier, and value was invented for demonstration and must not be interpreted as real.
_evidence_tier: Invented sample. Entity and field names reconstruct the verified model; values are fictional.
_model_reference: See measurement-model.md and data-dictionary.csv for the entities used here.

theory_of_change.name: Pathways to Stable Housing (SAMPLE)
theory_of_change.summary: Fictional theory of change: coordinated shelter, case management, and employment support reduce return-to-homelessness.

indicators.name: Percent of exits to permanent housing (SAMPLE)
indicators._note: Indicator/KPI COUNT is pending verification; this is one illustrative KPI, not a stated total.

results.narrative: Fictional mid-year result: 58% of exits were to permanent housing against a 60% target; 137 of 250 targeted individuals served.
